theme: enforcement layer — soft rules graduate to hook guards
summary: Three SKILL.md rules from v2.6.20-22 (status refresh, em-dash, coherence claims) become hook-enforced where Claude Code permits. PostToolUse flushes brand status mechanically after every write. Stop / SubagentStop audit the last assistant message for em-dashes and entity-field claims without a coherence check. Text output cannot be blocked pre-render, so the two tone/coherence hooks are audit-with-stderr-surface, not hard block — documented as known gap.

changes.reason: Mechanical recomputation of status.json completeness + wedge_complete + last_activity. No LLM. Called by post-write-flush hook.
PostToolUse on Bash. Detects write-to-context.py invocations on brand paths, synchronously refreshes status.
Stop + SubagentStop. Audits last assistant message for em-dashes (tone-audit.log) and entity-field claims without recent coherence_check (coherence-audit.log). Surfaces stderr summary.
Wire the three new hook entries.

operator_impact: status.json now auto-refreshes after every brand write. Em-dash and coherence violations log to .phantom/ audit files.
tested_on: refresh-brand-status.py verified on _EXAMPLE data (grades partial/partial/partial/complete, wedge_complete=true)
post-write-flush.py verified via simulated PostToolUse JSON (brand slug extracted, refresh invoked, status.json updated)
turn-end-audit.py verified via fake transcript with 2 em-dashes + 1 unchecked entity claim (both logged + stderr summary emitted)
caught_by: user request after v2.6.22 ship — 'règle le pb' on the three known-gaps listed across v2.6.20-22 manifests.
known_gaps: Em-dash and coherence audits cannot block offending output — Claude Code does not expose a pre-render hook on assistant text. Soft enforcement only; audit logs accumulate and stderr warnings surface on next tool call.
Hard prevention of narrated fabrications would require either a Claude Code feature addition or restructuring workflows to route claims through tool calls (pre-hookable) rather than free text.
